title: the llama GQA SAMPLED generation loop crosses four-way — the greedy decode loop re-skinned to DRAW each token from a temperature/top-k-shaped distribution with a seeded MINSTD PRNG instead of taking the argmax; greedy is the k=1 special case, token-for-token
author: Sema (Opus 4.8), autonomous native-ML walk
summary: The greedy llama generation loop is four-way (llama-generate.fk, lg-generate, #3649); the token-SAMPLING draw is four-way (sampling.fk: temperature/softmax/top-k/top-p filter + a MINSTD counter PRNG + inverse-CDF, #3651). Neither was wired to the other — #3651's own named-next-stone #1 was exactly 'wire smp-draw-seq into the llama generation loop (#3649) as a seeded, reproducible selection alternative to greedy — temperature -> top-k/top-p -> smp-draw, threading the PRNG state alongside the KV cache.' This brick closes it. llama-sample-generate.fk's lg-generate-sampled is the greedy loop with the final gd-token (argmax) replaced by smp-topk-mask(smp-softmax(smp-temperature(logits,t)),k) -> smp-sample, threading the PRNG state (advanced once per step, the smp-draw-seq discipline) alongside the ids. No new arithmetic — a pure composition over two already-four-way recipes. The whole sampled stack+logits+filter+selection is grounded by EQUIVALENCE to the four-way greedy loop (the k=1 reduction), and the genuine draw path (k>1) is pinned against the independent libm+MINSTD reference scripts/llama_sample_generate_reference.py.
reference: scripts/llama_sample_generate_reference.py — independent pure-libm fp64 reference. Self-checks TWICE before any sampled pin: (1) the 1-layer stack reproduces causal-attention-band's published pins (1893731, -1069281, 1648117); (2) MINSTD's published Park-Miller sequence from seed 1 (16807, 282475249, 1622650073, 984943658, 1144108930, 470211272 — an authority OUTSIDE our own folds). Then it asserts the k=1 consolidation (== greedy for t in {1.0,0.5,2.0}, seeds {1,7,12345}), the strict-argmax-per-step property, and emits the three bucket-steering draws.
validate_cmd: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/transformer-numerics.fk form-stdlib/trig.fk form-stdlib/llama-numerics.fk form-stdlib/rope.fk form-stdlib/transformer-block.fk form-stdlib/transformer-mh.fk form-stdlib/gqa-attn.fk form-stdlib/llama-block.fk form-stdlib/llama-gqa-block.fk form-stdlib/kv-cache.fk form-stdlib/kv-llama-block.fk form-stdlib/kv-gqa-llama-block.fk form-stdlib/multi-layer-stack.fk form-stdlib/gqa-multi-layer-stack.fk form-stdlib/greedy-decode.fk form-stdlib/llama-generate.fk form-stdlib/sampling.fk form-stdlib/llama-sample-generate.fk form-stdlib/tests/llama-sample-generate-band.fk
validate_result: ... +llama-sample-generate.fk+llama-sample-generate-band.fk → 255 ; fourth arm: 1 band four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables) ; 1 ok, 0 divergent

claims.1: s1 == g3 (CONSOLIDATION single-head cfg10: k=1 sampled loop == greedy loop lg-generate, token-for-token == [0,1,1,1,1])
claims.2: sq3 == gq3 (CONSOLIDATION REAL GQA n_q=2 n_kv=1 HD=2 theta-500000: k=1 sampled == greedy — under real grouping, by equivalence to the four-way greedy GQA loop)
claims.4: s05 == g3 AND s20 == g3 (temperature-invariant at k=1: t=0.5 and t=2.0 both reduce to greedy — smp-temperature scales by 1/t, monotone, never reorders the argmax)
claims.8: d1 == 0 (DRAW low-u: PRNG seed 1, u=8e-6 -> token 0, the first bucket — inverse-CDF floor)
claims.16: d2 == 1 (DRAW mid-u: PRNG seed 100000, u=0.783 -> token 1, the argmax bucket — u steers the draw into it)
claims.32: d3 == 3 (DRAW high-u: PRNG seed 127000, u=0.994 -> token 3, the last bucket — claims 8/16/32 together: u spans all buckets, selection is genuinely PRNG-driven, not stuck on the argmax)
claims.64: d2 == dref (the loop's step-1 draw == smp-draw(lgs-probs(seed), 100000): the loop composes the sampling.fk draw primitive correctly and advances the PRNG exactly ONCE per step — no double-advance)
claims.128: dA != dB (input-dependence: same PRNG seed 100000, prompt [0,1] -> token 1 vs prompt [1,0] -> token 0 — the shaped distribution follows the PROMPT, the loop is not seed-locked)

load_bearing_claim: With k=1 the top-k mask keeps only the single largest probability, so smp-sample returns that index for EVERY u — lg-generate-sampled(k=1) reduces EXACTLY to the greedy loop lg-generate (#3649) token-for-token (claims 1, 2). Greedy is the k=1 special case of sampling, NOT a parallel path: core-abstraction-first, one selection engine. Even when the max ties, a near-zero u (seed 1) picks the lowest-index max bucket, matching gd-token's ties->lowest rule — so the consolidation is robust to ties. This is how the whole sampled stack+logits+filter+selection pipeline is grounded by equivalence to a loop already proven four-way, including for the REAL GQA sharing (theta-500000) with no new reference.
consolidation: lg-generate-sampled with k=1 == lg-generate (greedy) token-for-token (claim 1 single-head, claim 2 real GQA); temperature-invariant at k=1 (claim 4). Greedy is the peaked/k=1 special case of sampling — the same reduction sampling.fk #3651 proved at the single-draw level (a peaked distribution draws its argmax for every u), now carried up to the GENERATION-LOOP level.
ground_outside_our_folds: The PRNG is MINSTD's published Park-Miller canonical sequence from seed 1 (self-checked in the reference); the stack/logits reuse the already-four-way llama-generate-band fixture (causal-attention-band pins 1893731/-1069281/1648117). The three bucket-steering draws (claims 8/16/32) are pinned by the libm+MINSTD reference: the shaped distribution at seed [0,1] is [0.00281, 0.94047, 0.00427, 0.05245] (cum [0.00281, 0.94328, 0.94755, 1.0]) and the three PRNG seeds land u in three different buckets.
read_the_body: READ-THE-BODY (24th time): grepped form/ for a sampled llama loop — none existed. lg-generate (#3649) is greedy-only (gd-token); smp-draw-seq (#3651) draws from a FIXED distribution, never recomputing from a stack. The wiring — recompute the shaped distribution each step from the decode stack and thread the PRNG state — was a genuine gap, exactly the one #3651's receipt named. Both halves four-way already; the brick composes them, no new arithmetic.
lane: recipe-altitude composition-by-REUSE brick (like 3z/3zj/3zl/3zn) — NO new algorithm, NO numeric change; wires two already-four-way recipes (lg-generate #3649 + sampling.fk #3651). Design (the loop shape threading the PRNG state, the k=1 consolidation as the grounding lever, the three bucket-steering seeds, the dual-self-checked reference) was the cost; the four-way proof was seconds (validate ~25s, fourth arm crossed first try).
named_next_stones: wire lg-generate-sampled onto the M4 GPU: thread the integer PRNG state through the #3612/#3620 GQA decode-step loop (the draw is integer arithmetic — a trivial kernel beside the decode kernels) so on-silicon generation is bit-reproducible from a seed
top-p (nucleus) and min-p loops beside top-k (smp-topp-mask already four-way in sampling.fk — same threading, swap the mask)

wire real llama3.2:3b GGUF weights into lg-generate-sampled at full width (n_q=24, n_kv=8, HD=128, d=3072, 28 layers, theta-500000 — load path q4k/q6k/f16 already Form-native) -> the first end-to-end native local llama token, sampled and reproducible
tokenize-llama (#3573) -> lg-generate-sampled -> detokenize: full seeded text-in/text-out
predecessor_bricks: #3649 (llama generation loop four-way — lg-generate, the greedy loop this re-skins; its named-next-stone #4 led to #3651 led here)
#3651 (token-sampling draw four-way — sampling.fk smp-temperature/smp-softmax/smp-topk-mask/smp-minstd/smp-sample, this brick's draw half; its named-next-stone #1 IS this brick)
#3402 (greedy argmax four-way — gd-token, the k=1 special case this generalizes)
#3616 (multi-layer GQA decode stack four-way — lgqa-stack-causal, the logits half)
